The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.
Users may enter and exit the facility more than one time.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.

arrival.text: No need to pull a ticket! Pull up to our facility entrance and scan your Spot Hero QR code to open the gate.
You will be directed where to park.
The Parking N Fly shuttle will pick you up directly at your vehicle to take you to the airport.

departure.text: Upon return, please claim your luggage and follow the pick up instructions on the Locator Slip provided by your shuttle driver.
The shuttle will bring you to your car. From there, follow the signs to the exit.

common.title: The Parking Spot Fly ATL - Premium Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3950 Conley St. This is the lot, operated by The Parking Spot. It is located on the East side of Conley St. between Camp Creek Pkwy. and Oxford Ave.
restrictions: Complimentary bottled water is available at checkout.
If you park outside your reservation times, you will be charged for each additional day upon exit.
Please have your QR code ready to scan when you arrive. This helps us get you parked and on your way in no time. Thank you!
THIS LOCATION DOES NOT SERVICE THE INTERNATIONAL TERMINAL. If you require service to the International Terminal, you must reserve parking at The Parking Spot 1 .
The Parking Spot reservations are non-refundable and may not be cancelled.
The Parking Spot reservations may be changed up to 1 hour prior to your scheduled arrival time.

amenities.description: A valet will park the users vehicle at this facility.
The facility has a roof over the vehicles.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has EV charging capabilities.

arrival.text: Call the valet 15 minutes before your scheduled reservation at 800.913.8573 Ext. 2. Arrive to the semicircle next to GICC SkyTrain station near the Gateway Marriott.
The valet will hand you a ticket and will park your car. You must have this ticket in order to exit.
Proceed to the GICC SkyTrain Station and board the FREE ATL SkyTrain to the airport.

departure.text: Once you get your baggage, head to SkyTrain, which is located at ground transportation. Board the SkyTrain and call the valet 800.913.8573 Ext. 2. exit at the GICC station, which is one stop from the airport. Exit the SkyTrain to your right toward the Renaissance hotel side. Take the elevator down to the street.
Come to our location at 4130 Skytrain Wy. and retrieve your vehicle from the valet.

common.title: GICC Skytrain - Indoor Valet
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 4130 Skytrain Wy. This is the Gateway 2 garage, operated by Atlas Parking. It is located behind the Renaissance Atlanta Airport Gateway Hotel and across the street from the Skytrain station.
restrictions: Please make sure you are confirming your return time with the valet attendant before you depart for the airport.
The SkyTrain is free of charge.
There is a $26 fee to access your vehicle outside of the normal hours of operation which are 6am-10pm.

arrival.text: Call 15 minutes before your reservation: 470-488-8671 Ext. 5. Arrive at the upper garage entrance behind the Renaissance Hotel, across from the SkyTrain station. Pull to the stop sign for the Attendant.
The attendant will give you a ticket and help you park your car. Keep the ticket to exit.
Proceed to the GICC SkyTrain Station and take the free ATL SkyTrain to the airport.

departure.text: After baggage claim, board the SkyTrain from ground transportation. Call the valet. Exit at the GICC station. Take the elevator down to the street and enter the garage across the street.
Once you return to 4130 Skytrain Way to retrieve your vehicle from the attendant.

common.title: GICC Skytrain - Indoor Self- Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 4130 Skytrain Way, College Park, GA. This is the Gateway 2 garage, operated by Atlas Parking. It is located behind the Renaissance Atlanta Airport Gateway Hotel and across the street from the Skytrain station.
restrictions: $26 fee to access the vehicle outside regular hours (6 a.m.–10 p.m.)
Confirm return time with the attendant before departing.
Phone number 470-488-8671 Ext. 5
SkyTrain is free of charge.

arrival.text: Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so may result in a ticket or tow.
When you arrive, the gate will automatically open. You may park anywhere that doesn’t say “Reserved”.
Gather your belongings and head to the shuttle pickup area.

departure.text: When you arrive back to ATL, gather your belongings and head to the shuttle pickup area outside of arrivals. Take the shuttle back to the hotel.
Simply drive out when you are ready to go! The gate will open.

common.title: Westin ATL - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 4736 Best Rd. This is the Westin ATL valet lot, operated by Bags Valet. It is located on the east side of Best Rd.  The entrance is across the street from the Marriott.
restrictions: Shuttle Information: The shuttle runs every 30 minutes between the hours of 5am-12am. The shuttle leaves the hotel every 30 minutes from the top of the hour. The shuttle picks up twice at the airport on the :15 and :45 of every hour. Shuttle picks up at the Ground Transportation on the Domestic Side only. Transportation between 12am-5pm MUST be secured by the customer.
Height restriction: 7' 0"
Please Note: Management is not responsible for theft or damage to vehicles or customers' belongings.

arrival.text: Pull a ticket when you enter. You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved." You may then proceed to board the shuttle to Hartsfield–Jackson Atlanta International Airport.

departure.text: Upon returning to the airport, proceed to the ground transportation area (outside of the baggage claim area) to board the shuttle. You will go to Ground Transportation. The shuttle location is Zone 9-13 for the Renaissance.

When you return to the hotel, show the valet attendant the ticket you pulled when you arrived, along with your SpotHero parking pass (either printed or on your mobile device). The attendant will give you a validation sticker, which you will attach to your ticket.
Insert your validated ticket into the machine at the exit gate. If there are errors, please see a valet attendant.
The gate will open and you'll be free to go!

common.title: Atlanta Renaissance Concourse Airport Hotel - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1 Hartsfield Center Pkwy. This is the Atlanta Renaissance Concourse Hotel lot, operated by SP+ Parking, A Metropolis Company. It is located on the south side of Hartsfield Dr. SW between Field Place SW and N Inner Loop Rd.
restrictions: Please Note: Management is not responsible for theft or damage to vehicles or customers' belongings.

SpotHero is for airport customers ONLY. SpotHero reservations are not valid for overnight guests of the hotel. Hotel guests will be subject to pay the full daily rates and the SpotHero reservation could be canceled.

There is a complimentary shuttle SpotHero customers can take to Hartsfield–Jackson Atlanta International Airport Domestic Side Only. The shuttle runs every 30-45 minutes starting at 4:20 a.m. until 1 a.m.
Upon returning to the airport, the shuttle picks up from ground transportation, Domestic between Zone 9-13 http://www.atl.com/maps/

arrival.text: When you arrive at the facility, the valet will hand you a ticket, confirm how long you plan on parking, and will park your car. You must have this ticket in order to exit. Proceed to board the shuttle. The shuttle runs every 10 to 15 mins from 6 am to midnight. If your flight lands after midnight pleas call 404-553-6344.

departure.text: Upon return, please call 1-404-704-0910 for shuttle pick up once you have collected your luggage. When you return to the facility, show the valet your SpotHero parking pass and the ticket you received upon arrival.
The valet will retrieve your car and you're free to go!

common.title: Routes Airport Parking ATL - Uncovered Valet
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 2144 Sullivan Rd. This is the ATL off-airport lot, operated by Routes Airport Parking. It is located on the South side of Sullivan Rd. between Embarcadero Ln. and Massachusetts Blvd.
restrictions: The shuttle runs every 15 to 20 mins from 6 am to midnight. If your flight lands after midnight please call 404-553-6344.

arrival.text: Show the Attendant your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed or on a mobile device.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".

You may then proceed to the shuttle. The shuttle runs every 30 mins between 4am to 2am daily. PLEASE NOTE: The shuttle bus is only transported to the Domestic Terminal and not the International Terminal.

departure.text: Upon arrival, please proceed to the pick up location at Ground Transportation. Please keep in mind the shuttle runs every 30 mins between 4am-2am. You may reach out to (404) 763-1600 for any additional shuttle questions.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: DoubleTree by Hilton ATL - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3400 Norman Berry Dr. This is the DoubleTree by Hilton ATL - Uncovered Self Park. It is located on the East side of Norman Berry Dr. between Bobby Brown Pkwy. and Virginia Ave. The entrance is marked by a brown 'DoubleTree' sign with white lettering.
restrictions: Online Car Sharing Services or Auto Membership Online Parking at this location is not permitted. Any violation of this policy will result in vehicle impoundment by Moody’s Wrecker Service, College Park, GA.
PLEASE NOTE: The shuttle bus is only transported to the Domestic Terminal and not the International Terminal.

The shuttle runs every 30 minutes between 4 am to 2 am daily. Upon arrival, please proceed to the pick-up location at Ground Transportation. You may reach out to (404) 763-1600 for any other shuttle questions.

arrival.text: Scan the QR code located on your SpotHero parking pass.
Follow the signs for the covered self-park lot.
The shuttle will meet you at your space, assist you with your luggage, and provide you with a boarding card indicating your row and space number.

departure.text:
Shuttle service is available at the domestic terminal only.

When arriving at the domestic terminal, take the escalator at Carousel #4 to the lower level, go left out Door LN1, and walk to the last “Off-Airport Shuttles” stanchion to catch the WallyPark shuttle. Upon Return: Text "SHUTTLE" to (678) 293-7255 for airport pickup. Due to construction at Hartsfield, please follow text directions for the most up-to-date pickup information.
When you are ready to leave, scan the QR code on your parking pass to exit the facility.
The gate will open and you're free to go!

common.title: WallyPark ATL - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip:
Enter this location at 3811 Wally Park Way. This is the entrance address for the WallyPark ATL - Covered Self Park lot. Due to being a new street, this address may not appear on Maps yet. As an alternative, please enter in your GPS 2600 Camp Creek Parkway, College Park, GA 30337.

Head northeast on Herschel Road toward Camp Creek Parkway/ GA-6. Turn left onto Camp Creek Parkway/ GA-6. Turn left on to Wally Park Way from the traffic light. Proceed straight ahead onto to the WallyPark parking lot.


Please note this reservation is valid for covered self-park only.

Head northeast on Herschel Road toward Camp Creek Parkway/ GA-6. Turn left onto Camp Creek Parkway/ GA-6. Turn left on to Wally Park Way from the traffic light. Proceed straight ahead onto to the WallyPark parking lot. Please note this reservation is valid for uncovered self-park only.
restrictions: Be advised: if your return flight is delayed, you MUST extend your SpotHero reservation. Exiting the parking location after the reservation end time may result in additional fees to exit.
Shuttle pick-up and drop-off service for this listing is to the domestic terminal only.

To request a shuttle pickup, text WP to (678) 293-7255. Take the escalator at carousel #4 to the lower level and proceed to the left LN-1. Please wave to the driver when you see the shuttle so he knows you are waiting.

departure.text: Upon your arrival to ATL, collect your belongings at baggage claim and text "SHUTTLE" to 678-293-7255.
International Travelers: For expedited shuttle service, wait until you have cleared customs before texting for pickup. Proceed to the lower level arrival area and exit door A2.
When you arrive back at the facility, drive to the exit and scan your QR code. The gate will lift and you are free to go!

departure.text: New pick-up location: After claiming your luggage, proceed to the North Terminal door LN1. Take the escalator downstairs and make a left turn towards the double doors. Check-in with the airport representative in the green vest at the "Off-Airport Pick-Up Check-In" station to have a shuttle dispatched. Upon return, please claim your luggage and follow the pick up instructions on the Locator Slip provided by your shuttle driver.
The shuttle will bring you to your car. From there, follow the signs to the exit.

common.title: The Parking Spot 1 - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 2741 Camp Creek Pkwy. This is The Parking Spot 1 lot. From the intersection of Camp Creek Pkwy. and Potomac Dr. head north onto Potomac Dr. until you reach the entrance gate. There will be a black and yellow "The Parking Spot" sign visible from Camp Creek Pkwy. marking the entrance location. Be sure to use the open-air entrance gate to enter the lot
restrictions: Complimentary bottled water is available at checkout.
If you park outside your reservation times, you will be charged for each additional day upon exit.
Please have your QR code ready to scan when you arrive. This helps us get you parked and on your way in no time. Thank you!
The Parking Spot reservations are non-refundable and may not be cancelled.
The Parking Spot reservations may be changed up to 1 hour prior to your scheduled arrival time.
This TPS shuttle only services the domestic terminal.

amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The facility has a roof over the vehicles.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.
The facility is wheelchair accessible.

items.full_description: The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.
A fee determined by the garage operator to cover additional garage operator costs.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.
A fee determined by the garage operator to cover additional garage operator costs.

arrival.text: No need to pull a ticket! Pull up to the facility's center gate entrance and scan your SpotHero QR code to open the gate.
Once you have scanned your QR code, An attendant will direct you where to park.
The Parking Spot shuttle will pick you up directly at your vehicle to take you to the airport.

departure.text: New pick-up location: After claiming your luggage, proceed to the North Terminal door LN1. Take the escalator downstairs and make a left turn towards the double doors. Check-in with the airport representative in the green vest at the "Off-Airport Pick-Up Check-In" station to have a shuttle dispatched. Upon return, please claim your luggage and follow the pick up instructions on the Locator Slip provided by your shuttle driver.
The shuttle will bring you to your car. From there, follow the signs to the exit.

arrival.text: You will receive an email confirmation containing a QR code. Please scan the QR code at entry and exit for automated access. Overstays will be charged at the daily rate.

Shuttle service to ATL is available at no additional cost from this location 24/7, and it will pick you up at your vehicle when you park. At this time you will receive information about how to arrange pickup for the shuttle back to the lot as well.

departure.text:
Domestic Arrivals:
North Terminal: Upon exiting North Baggage Claim, turn right into the main hallway and follow signs to Ground Transportation. Exit at Door W-1 and proceed across the main roadway toward the SkyTrain North Entrance. Follow the sidewalk to the left of the SkyTrain building toward the off-airport shuttle parking lots. Cross to Row D where you will find Peachy Airport Parking at Space 4.

South Terminal: Upon exiting South Baggage Claim, turn left into the main hallway and follow signs to Ground Transportation. Exit at Door W-2 and proceed across the main roadway toward the SkyTrain South Entrance. Follow the sidewalk to the right of the SkyTrain building toward the off-airport shuttle parking lots. Cross to Row D where you will find Peachy Airport Parking at Space 4.

Wait in the designated area and look for the Green Peachy Shuttle bus marked INDOOR BUS, COVERED BUS, or OUTDOOR BUS depending on where you parked. Shuttles run 24 hours per day. For assistance, call 404-767-7275.

4. International Arrivals: Shuttle buses run every 20 minutes, 24 hours per day, on the hour and half hour. Pick up is on the lower level at the Orange 2 “Park-Ride Shuttle” sign.

Please call 404-767-7275 for pickup and indicate that you are at the International Terminal, along with your last name and number in your party.

Note: Shuttle service to the International Terminal is only available from the indoor (Lot 4) and covered (Lot 2) lots, not from the outdoor lot (Lot 1).
When exiting, scan your QR Code again at the box with the red flashing lights.

common.title: Peachy Airport Parking - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3100 Sylvan Rd. This lot is operated by Peachy Airport Parking. It is located on the east side of Sylvan Rd. between N Central Ave. and Baker Dr. The entrance is marked by a canopy with a green 'Peachy Parking' sign with white lettering.
restrictions: Please Note: For shuttle service to the International Terminal, you must reserve INDOOR parking at this location.

Shuttle service to ATL is available at no additional cost from this location daily. The shuttle will pick you up at your vehicle when you park. Please see Redemption section for detailed instructions on shuttle return from the airport.

This location offers discounted rates for reservations spanning multiple days

arrival.text: When you arrive at the location, show the attendant your SpotHero parking pass
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Please take note of the instructions given by the attendant. They will dispatch the shuttle to your vehicle.

departure.text: Upon your arrival back at the airport, please head to the shuttle pickup area. Exit through door W1 (North Terminal) or W2 (South Terminal). Once in the off-site shuttle pick-up area, we are at station D1.
Simply leave when you are ready to go!

common.title: Sky Lot Parking 1 ATL - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3802 Washington Rd. This is the Sky Lot Parking Lot, operated by Sky Lot Parking. It is located on the East side of Washington Rd. between Camp Creek Pkwy. and Lakemont Dr. The entrance is next to the Chevron Gas Station.
restrictions: DOMESTIC TERMINAL ONLY

arrival.text: Before parking, please visit the front desk of the hotel. Show your SpotHero parking pass either printed or from your mobile device. The front desk will guide you where to park your vehicle.
This spot is monitored by license plate ONLY.  Please verify that your license plate matches the information presented in the SpotHero app. You may park anywhere that does not say reserved.

Departure: Shuttle service from the hotel departs every 30 minutes at :00 and :30 past the hour. The final drop-off at the airport is at 11:30 PM. Guests will need to request a drop-off after midnight.

departure.text: Arrival: Upon arrival at the airport, please proceed to the Ground Transportation area for shuttle pickup. The shuttle operates every 30 minutes, picking up at :15 and :45 past the hour until 11:45 PM. After midnight, guests must contact the hotel directly to request a shuttle.
Once you have arrived back to your vehicle, you may leave whenever you are ready.

common.title: Four Points by Sheraton Atlanta Airport West - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3520 North Desert Dr. This is the Four Points Atlanta Airport. It is located on the NW side of Desert Dr.
restrictions: Arrival: Upon arrival at the airport, please proceed to the Ground Transportation area for shuttle pickup. The shuttle operates every 30 minutes, picking up at :15 and :45 past the hour until 11:45 PM. After midnight, guests must contact the hotel directly to request a shuttle.
Departure: Shuttle service from the hotel departs every 30 minutes at :00 and :30 past the hour. The final drop-off at the airport is at 11:30 PM.
Our shuttles are not wheelchair accessible. Guests will need to contact the property in advance to make necessary accommodations.
Shuttle only travels to Domestic terminals and not International.
